division_title: PENALTIES AND DISPOSITION OF FEES, FINES, AND FORFEITURES
chapter_title: Disposition of Fees, Fines, and Forfeitures
text: Notwithstanding any other provisions of law, all fines and forfeitures collected for violations of Division 16.5 (commencing with Section 38000) shall be deposited in the appropriate fund in the county where the violation occurred and distributed in the same manner as specified in Section 42201.5, and shall be used for enforcing laws related to the operation of off-highway motor vehicles.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 18. PENALTIES AND DISPOSITION OF FEES, FINES, AND FORFEITURES [42000 - 42277]
### Chapter 2. Disposition of Fees, Fines, and Forfeitures [42200 - 42240]
#### Article 1. Fines and Forfeitures [42200 - 42205]
##### § 42204

Notwithstanding any other provisions of law, all fines and forfeitures collected for violations of Division 16.5 (commencing with Section 38000) shall be deposited in the appropriate fund in the county where the violation occurred and distributed in the same manner as specified in Section 42201.5, and shall be used for enforcing laws related to the operation of off-highway motor vehicles.

*(Amended by Stats. 2002, Ch. 563, Sec. 46. Effective January 1, 2003.)*
